assignment.title: Experiment 1 - Long-Term Latent Fingerprint Samples
assignment.instructor_text:
Fingerprint impressions can remain in place for a surprisingly long time Even exposure to elements such as heat, cold, and moisture very often will not destory fingerprint impression. However, a smudged fingerprint impression is typically of little value to forensic experts. Smudging occurs if pressure has been placed upon the fingerprint impression or when the subject's finger slides across a surface.

Read the details and procedures carefully before you begin the Experiment for Long-Term Latent Fingerprints.
